name: ITHAX Acquisition Corp III
business: We are a blank check company incorporated on July 3, 2025 as a Cayman Islands exempted company and formed for the purpose of effecting a merger, amalgamation, share exchange, asset acquisition, share purchase, reorganization or similar business combination with one or more businesses. We have not selected any business combination target and we have not, nor has anyone on our behalf, initiated any substantive discussions, directly or indirectly, with any business combination target.

exposures.sentence: While we may pursue a business combination target in any business or industry, we intend to search for businesses that have an enterprise value in excess of $500 million, are currently in the asset management, leisure, hospitality, catering, travel, entertainment, gaming, lifestyle and related services sectors, driven by next-generation technologies including AI and digital assets, and material business positioning in the United States, as well as Latin America, European markets and beyond.

While we may pursue a business combination target in any business or industry, we intend to search for businesses that have an enterprise value in excess of $500 million, are currently in the asset management, leisure, hospitality, catering, travel, entertainment, gaming, lifestyle and related services sectors, driven by next-generation technologies including AI and digital assets, and material business positioning in the United States, as well as Latin America, European markets and beyond.

We may pursue an initial business combination in any business or industry but expect to focus on technology and software infrastructure companies whose products and services target financial services, real estate and asset management companies.

While we may pursue a business combination target in any business or industry, we intend to search for businesses that have an enterprise value in excess of $500 million, are currently in the asset management, leisure, hospitality, catering, travel, entertainment, gaming, lifestyle and related services sectors, driven by next-generation technologies including AI and digital assets, and material business positioning in the United States, as well as Latin America, European markets and beyond.
